rag_rules: Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line when AGREE reports type errors.
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies.
